name: monzo
description: Read-only Monzo banking integration — balances, transactions, pots, and spending analysis via MCP server

client_id.title: Monzo Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth Client ID from developers.monzo.com (starts with oauth2client_)

client_secret.title: Monzo Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth Client Secret from developers.monzo.com (starts with mnzconf.)
